controls.source: AWS GovCloud FedRAMP High + CaseFlow Cloud
controls.narrative: Cloud-layer IAM roles and federated identity provided by AWS. Application-layer accounts (per-tenant users, role assignment, MFA enrollment) implemented by CaseFlow Cloud.
VPC, security groups, and network ACLs provided by AWS. CaseFlow Cloud adds application-layer WAF rules and API gateway policies.

controls.source: AWS GovCloud FedRAMP High + CaseFlow Cloud
controls.narrative: CloudTrail provides cloud-side audit events. CaseFlow Cloud generates application events (login, case access, export) and forwards to central SIEM.
Customer IdP via SAML/OIDC. CaseFlow Cloud enforces application-layer MFA.
Cloud-side configuration baselines provided by AWS. Application CI/CD configuration managed by CaseFlow Cloud.

controls.source: AWS GovCloud FedRAMP High + CaseFlow Cloud
controls.narrative: Cloud patching provided by AWS. Application patching and dependency scanning managed by CaseFlow Cloud.

controls.source: AWS GovCloud FedRAMP High + CaseFlow Cloud
controls.narrative: Cloud-side incident detection provided by AWS. Application incident triage and customer notification by CaseFlow Cloud.

controls.source: AWS GovCloud FedRAMP High + CaseFlow Cloud
controls.narrative: Cloud-side vulnerability scanning by AWS Inspector. Application-layer scans, dependency scans, and container scans by CaseFlow Cloud.
KMS and HSM provided by AWS (FIPS 140-3 validated). CaseFlow Cloud uses KMS for application-layer encryption.
